M-040.NAME: email-delivery
M-040.path: backend/app/email backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py scripts/phase36-resend-deploy-smoke.mjs scripts/phase44-auth-email-ux-smoke.mjs scripts/phase51-brand-assets-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-27.xml docs/plans/Phase-36.xml docs/plans/Phase-44.xml docs/plans/Phase-51.xml
M-040.owns: Email provider adapter, verification/password reset email templates, provider error mapping, and safe operator evidence for email delivery.
M-040.purpose: Provide a KrotPN-native email delivery surface for verified registration and password recovery without exposing tokens or provider secrets.

exports.fn-send-verification-email: Send a one-time registration verification link or code to a normalized email address.
exports.fn-send-password-reset-email: Send a one-time password reset link to a normalized email address.
exports.fn-build-verification-template: Render branded Russian and English verification subject, HTML with public email-logo asset, and text fallback content.
exports.fn-build-password-reset-template: Render branded Russian and English password reset subject, HTML with public email-logo asset, and text fallback content.
exports.fn-map-email-provider-error: Map provider HTTP or transport failures to typed application errors.

implementation-state.state-1: Phase-27 implemented provider-neutral requests, Resend and SMTP adapters, disabled-provider guard, templates, safe log markers, and fake-provider test coverage.
implementation-state.state-2: Live provider smoke is operator-run only after EMAIL_PROVIDER and provider secrets are configured outside tests; clean VPS registration email is now operator-confirmed.
implementation-state.state-3: Phase-36 local execution adds production deploy wiring and request-shape tests so Resend is enabled during clean VPS installs and registration no longer fails with provider_disabled when an API key is supplied.
implementation-state.state-4: Phase-44 local execution adds branded verification/reset templates, reset URL delivery, template log markers, and token-redaction tests.
implementation-state.state-5: Phase-51 adds a public email body logo to verification/reset HTML templates through FRONTEND_URL while preserving text fallbacks and token redaction.

source-transfer.reuse: Resend request payload shape, readable UTF-8 templates, provider error normalization.
source-transfer.do-not-reuse: Standalone KPprotoN portal registration endpoint or DETS token storage.

constraints.constraint-1: Verification tokens must never appear in logs, traces, or provider error payloads.
constraints.constraint-2: Email sending failures block registration activation but do not create user, trial, VPN, or MTProto records.
constraints.constraint-3: Provider configuration remains env-backed through M-001 settings.
constraints.constraint-4: Production Resend configuration must use https://api.resend.com/emails, Authorization Bearer API key, and noreply@krotpn.xyz sender after domain verification.
constraints.constraint-5: Email body logo rendering is distinct from BIMI or mailbox sender-avatar behavior and must not claim provider-side avatar control.

phase-36-plan.step-1: Strengthen Resend request-shape tests for URL, Bearer header, sender, recipient, subject, HTML, and text payload.
phase-36-plan.step-2: Add deploy smoke coverage that EMAIL_PROVIDER is not left disabled when Resend API key is provided.
phase-36-plan.step-3: Keep live Resend smoke operator-only and redact message IDs, API keys, tokens, and full verification links.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-17: backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py passed locally with Phase-36 Resend URL, Bearer header, sender, payload, timeout, and safe receipt assertions.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-19: Operator clean-deploy registration via email succeeded with Resend configured, closing the provider_disabled production blocker.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-01: backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py and Phase-44 static smoke passed for branded verification/reset templates and token redaction.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-06-02: backend/tests/test_email_delivery.py passed 5/5 and Phase-51 smoke passed for public email-logo HTML rendering, clean text fallback, and protected deploy/install guard.

M-040.hotspot: H-026: Email delivery must not leak verification tokens, API keys, or raw provider responses
